game_name: Joe Montana II: Sports Talk Football

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based play selection with real-time execution creates alternating decision and action phases; tension builds within individual drives and matches across multiple possessions

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial difficulty with basic offensive and defensive concepts; AI opponents play predictably
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased opponent complexity; play-calling strategy becomes more critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Championship/tournament opponents employ sophisticated formations and counter-strategies
notable_spikes: Championship finals with max difficulty AI

notable_level_patterns.description: Self-contained match with beginning, middle, and end; player faces set opponent with defined difficulty
Multiple games across season structure with increasing opponent quality and playoff tournament climax
Each offensive/defensive drive represents a micro-tension cycle with discrete objectives and resolution

note: TCRF source provided only navigation/meta content without substantive game design documentation. No actual gameplay mechanics, level structure, or design patterns documented in provided source material.
